title: ToolResultFrame
description: backend → TUI (render): the output of a tool invocation. Direction: backend → TUI. The envelope field is a discriminated union over the 5 KOSMOS primitives (Spec 031). Renderer dispatch MUST use the envelope.kind field — no string sniffing of payload body (FR-008).

call_id.description: ULID correlating this result to its originating tool_call.

envelope.description: 5-primitive discriminated union. Each arm MUST match the upstream Spec 022 / 031 output schema. Unknown kind values MUST fall through to UnrecognizedPayload renderer (FR-033).
